programme.title: Christmas With The Andersons
programme.desc: When Michael Anderson loses his job, it looks like Christmas is cancelled. But when Aunt Katie comes to visit, she shows everyone how to pull off Christmas without money and helps them rediscover what matters most—family.

programme.title: The Truth About Christmas,

programme.title: Frank Lampard

programme.title: Philip Ovadia
programme.desc: American heart surgeon Dr Philip Ovadia has made it his life's mission to improve the public's metabolic health through lifestyle and dietary modification. He walks us through everything we need to know.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joseph Gordon-Levitt Gets Cocky While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt is answering questions about the power of YouTube while facing the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Cole Bennett Needs Lemonade While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Cole Bennett is a music video director, an entrepreneur and the man behind the Lyrical Lemonade media empire.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Russell Brand Achieves Enlightenment While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: After bantering with host Sean Evans about everything from visiting Donald Trump's tower to being a West Ham United super fan, Brand finds that his consciousness is awakened by the hot sauce.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Courteney Cox Becomes Friends With Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox takes on the wings of death and discusses dinner with Michael Jordan, the pros and cons of having Ed Sheeran as a houseguest and the enduring appeal of "Friends."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shaq Tries to Not Make a Face While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Shaquille O'Neal is one of the most dominant players in NBA history, an analyst on Inside the NBA and a DJ!

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Johnny Knoxville Gets Smoked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jackass alum has been gored by bulls and shot in the chest, but can he survive the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Blake Griffin Gets Full-Court Pressed By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Griffin takes on the wings of death and talks about everything from his burgeoning stand-up comedy career to that time he dunked over a Kia Optima.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Marques Brownlee Ranks Hot Sauce Labels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: During the spice storm, Marques Brownlee breaks down his pro Ultimate Frisbee career, offers sensible headphone advice and provides some scorching breakfast-cereal takes.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Weird Al Yankovic Goes Beyond Insanity While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The "White & Nerdy" icon takes on the vegan wings of death. As the Scovilles mount, Weird Al shares anecdotes about meeting Sir Paul McCartney & Michael Jackson and getting co-signed by Kurt Cobain.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Charlize Theron Takes a Rorschach Test While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As she struggles through the Scoville onslaught, Charlize Theron teaches Sean some South African slang, breaks down her reality-TV obsession and takes the spiciest Rorschach test in history.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Ken Jeong Performs a Physical While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The multitalented actor and former physician Ken Jeong faces off against the wings of death. Jeong dispels common medical myths, discusses encounters with NBA legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant and even gives Sean a free check-up.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Priyanka Chopra Jonas Explains the Essence of Hot Sauce While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: While taking on this seasons new hot wings, international star Priyanka Chopra Jonas discusses the difference between Indian food in New York and LA, explains why she met Larry Bird and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Emma Chamberlain Has a Spiritual Awakening While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Emma Chamberlain is an internet juggernaut who takes on the wings of death while discussing her love of coffee and fashion.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: Penn and Teller enjoy performances by comedy magician Jonathan Burns, mentalist Jo De Rijck, illusionist David Caserta, and card magician Jimmy Ichihana.

programme.title: Mr Morgans Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: Reuniting The Rubins
programme.desc: One man's mission to follow his dream is comically halted in its tracks at the request of his mother, who is hell-bent on seeing her dysfunctional grandchildren together one last time before she dies.

programme.title: Karen Kingsbury's The Bridge Part 2
programme.desc: Molly returns to Tennessee where old feelings reignite with Ryan, while they join efforts to help save the town's beloved bookstore, The Bridge.

programme.title: Deaf Girl Told She Can't Sing
programme.desc: Mia, a vocal major, is diagnosed with a rare condition causing progressive hearing loss. Devastated, she leaves music, but her mom helps her find a new way to "feel" music. Mia auditions for AGT, captivating audiences, and earns a record deal.

programme.title: Oprhan Teen Saves 1,000's Of Lives
programme.desc: A skilled hacker, Miles, caught between his manipulative mentor and a kind neighbor, chooses to do good, alerting the FBI to his mentor's crimes. His cooperation leads to a second chance, a new purpose, and a real family.

programme.title: Kid Rigs Raffle To Win
programme.desc: Mikey, a mischievous teen, cheats in a Tesla raffle to win a car for Noah's struggling dad. His elaborate schemes unravel when his mom exposes his dishonesty, leading to a surprising twist where Noah wins, and Mikey loses his coveted Christmas gift.

programme.title: Kid Builds Secret Tunnel To School
programme.desc: Jay, now a social media star, gets suspended, leading him to prank his new principal. His pranks backfire as a strict new principal takes over, trapping students. Jay and his friends unite, digging an escape tunnel, and restoring order to the school.

programme.title: Kid Gets World's Strictest Family
programme.desc: Sasha, a rebellious teen, is sent to her aunt and uncle's mansion for a "vacation" to learn discipline. Tricked into babysitting her conniving cousin Pearl, Sasha faces escalating pranks and blackmail, ultimately leading to a chaotic party and a shocking twist.

programme.title: Teen & Grandma Swap Lives For 1 Week
programme.desc: Teen Rosie and Grandma Louise swap lives for a week. Rosie navigates assisted living's challenges while Louise endures high school bullying. They uncover betrayal and embrace empathy, learning that understanding others' struggles fosters open hearts.

programme.title: Girl Goes Undercover On Boys' Basketball Team
programme.desc: Scrawny Joel, an unexpected basketball hero, and his athletic sister Rachel, trade places to navigate high school, basketball, and social challenges. Their scheme, filled with hilarious mishaps, ultimately leads to self-discovery and triumph on and off the court.

programme.title: Girls Mom Goes Undercover In High School
programme.desc: Overprotective mom Carol secretly enrolls in her daughter Nicole's high school to shield her from bullies. Her disguise and interventions cause chaos, exposing family secrets and school corruption, ultimately empowering Nicole to stand up for herself.

programme.title: Friends Live In Viral Prank House
programme.desc: Jason, a prank-obsessed YouTuber, creates chaos for his friends with elaborate pranks. After his friends retaliate with an epic prank that costs him a dream deal, Jason learns a valuable lesson about empathy, only to discover their prank was a setup for his biggest success yet.

programme.title: Turns Puppets Into Millions
programme.desc: Traumatized by a childhood injury and chronic illness, Logan is bullied and struggles with suicidal thoughts. Finding an outlet in YouTube, he befriends a dying boy whose positivity inspires Logan to embrace his dreams and overcome adversity.

programme.title: Poor Student Hides Being Genius
programme.desc: A scholarship student, Ryan, faces bullying for his poverty and struggles with dyslexia. Secretly tutored by a kind security guard, Ryan excels in math, earns respect, and later uses his success to uplift his family and help his mentor reunite with his estranged son.

programme.title: Teen Builds Home Out Of Toys
programme.desc: Cody, is belittled by his family for his passion for Legos. He leaves home and teams up with his best friend, Jacob, to build a full-size Lego house and document the process for his YouTube channel. The video goes viral, bringing him success and showing his father the value of his hobby.

programme.title: Genius And Jock Regret Wish
programme.desc: After wishing to switch lives, a bullied genius and a struggling jock swap bodies. They gain empathy for each other's struggles—bullying, family pressure, and learning differences—ultimately realizing their self-worth and becoming unlikely friends.

programme.title: Nerd Leaks Group Chat Messages
programme.desc: Bullied by Kenny, nerdy Eben leaks his private texts to expose him. But seeing the widespread hurt, Eben publicly apologizes, inspiring empathy. He and former friend Jessica then collaborate on a game, finding success and mending relationships.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This episode portrays the golden jackal – a shy predator, whose territory used to be the Balkan and even further southern regions. The animals are spreading north until Hungary or Germany and scientists are on their footstep, to find out why.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Controversy between the vets heat up on the subject of hunting and animal welfare to the point where Tina threatens to call the police on a group going hunting.

programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters: Kavinga Safari Camp Part 1
programme.desc: Kristina's guide, Andy, treats her to wonderful riverbed drives and wild encounters on foot. They happen upon a magnificent leopard with her impala kill up a tree and an eventful night drive leads them into a potential battle as a coalition of 3 foreign male lions step into the resident king's territory!

programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: The journey up the coast continues through Delaware to suburban New Jersey, and onwards into the heart of Manhattan. In Delaware, famous as a corporate tax haven, we visit a winery. In New York City we zip around with a bicycle courier and then head out to Long Island for oysters.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: Nowhere is the American way of life as relaxed as on Florida's beaches. The Keys, a chain of islands at the far southern end of the state, reveal a more laid-back side of the USA. But all of Florida amazes -- with secluded beaches, unspoiled nature, and the legacy of the early European settlers.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: From New York, the journey up the coast leads into the heart of New England. We visit Yale spend some time in the 19th century mansions at Newport, RI tour the coastal fishing and vacation towns of Massachusetts, and then meet a modern entrepreneur in Boston and see her rooftop gardens.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: New Hampshire has only 19 kilometers of coastline and short summers, all the more reason Shauna Fraser takes every opportunity to be by the sea. In the sheltered harbor of Rye, Shauna also targets inner attitude with yoga on a paddleboard.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There are senses we share with most animals, but what about those senses that human is equipped with? Infrared light, electromagnetic waves and ultrasound, are all found within a spectrum of sensory information that just passes by ordinary humans.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Tomorrow Transformed
programme.desc: Clean energy projects are transforming businesses and lives in Malaysia, South Africa and Australia. In Malaysia, we discovered how used cooking oil is being repurposed to power planes, while in South Africa, a start-up uses hydrogen to solve the country's energy problems, and Australia scientists are using the power of the sun to transform the energy sector.

programme.title: Inside...
programme.desc: The Center for Islamic Civilization in Tashkent stands at the intersection of culture, history, and faith. It's a place where Uzbekistan's rich intellectual and artistic heritage meets the possibilities of the future. Through conversations with scholars, curators, and craftspeople, we see how an idea conceived nearly a decade ago has grown into a national center dedicated to rediscovering the spirit of the Islamic Golden Age. Inside its walls, ancient manuscripts are being preserved and digitized, thousands of artifacts have been returned home, and new technologies bring history vividly to life. Beyond the Center, in the workshops of the Abul Kasim Madrasah, master artisans, woodcarvers, miniature painters, and ceramicists continue traditions that have shaped the region for centuries. Together, these voices reveal a living continuation of creativity and knowledge, showing how the legacy of Islamic civilization is not only remembered, but renewed in the heart of modern Uzbekistan.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: We celebrate the nation's emerging athletic talent, from the Olympic 4 × 400 meters relay team's record-breaking performance to Ross Branch's trailblazing achievements in the Dakar Rally and young tennis sensation Malak Macheng's rise. We follow the relay team's historic silver medal at the Paris 2024 Olympics, Branch's role in putting Botswana on the global motorsport map, and Malak's journey as the 2025 Junior Sportswoman of the Year. Through their stories, we highlight Botswana's growing sports culture and its next generation of champions.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: In southwestern Zimbabwe, art has been a language for millennia. Scattered across the towering hills are cave paintings dating back over 13,000 years. Today, in the rural villages of the Matobos, another vibrant tradition thrives house painting. A seasonal tradition has now become an annual competition rewarding the winners of My Beautiful Home, which has not only helped preserve an ancestral tradition and improve local women's livelihoods, but has now inspired spin-outs in the world of modern art, interior design, and fashion.

programme.title: DinoCity

programme.title: DinoCity

programme.title: DinoCity

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes. The animals march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies run to see Debbie and the children singing songs. A voice trumpet appears and plays a game with Po and Tinky Winky. It's called "Two Little Teletubbies Sitting On A Hill".

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song. Then, the Tubby Custard machine works again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Piccolo tries to retrain Gohan.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku finds the last two members for the Tournament of Power.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: There's time for a sparring match before the tournament.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The Zenos can't contain their excitement for the tournament.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Buu is stuck in a hibernation-like sleep!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The 7th Universe desperately looks for a tenth member.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her brute and worse - the boys locker room!innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend. The loss of Zane has fractured the team of Ninja, but when a mysterious invitation to Master Chen's ‘Tournament of Elements' arrives, everything is thrown into question – Is Zane alive, and are there others out there with powers like them? Sensei Garmadon warns them not to trust Master Chen, but they go in order to find Zane and make the team whole. On route to the island, the Ninja are briefly introduced to the other unique fighters with elemental powers, and the mysterious and beautiful Skylor intrigues Kai. Kai gets into a humbling scrap with Karlof, the Master of Metal, and learns some fights must be done on your own.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Cheat Code
programme.desc: Competing over who can ask Zoey to join their Sheep Week team, Logan cheats and unwittingly endangers the video game based Cyber Realm.

programme.title: The Bigger Picture
programme.desc: When the kids meddle in their teacher's dream to find test answers, they realize that in dreams, sweet little Ms. Putnam isn't so sweet... or little!

programme.title: Beasts And Dragons, Rise Of Garmadon
programme.desc: Zane, Jay, and Kai remember some of Ninjago's fearsome creatures so that Cole defend the cave from an unidentified monster. But Ninja confront memories of their greatest villain and ally, Garmadon, before the threat to Zane controls him completely.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots capture Soundwave while Megatron decides to resurrect a former plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus battles Predaking while Megatron seeks an alliance with Ratchet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots suspect a new enemy after recent acts of treachery.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil five-faced Quintessons forge a dark alliance with the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Rodimus Prime seeks the true nature of the Quintessons and comes to a terrifying realization.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Great battles rage. Blurr and Wheelie must complete a desperate mission, or Earth will be lost.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It started out as an experiment and became a brutal lesson in survival.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Kup hides a war story he refuses to tell, unlike the others.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime returns from death, making Rodimus proud.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Cyclonus and the Sweeps chase the traitor, Octane into the heart of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prime doubts his leadership as the Decepticons prepare for a massive invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a Decepticon invasion decimates them, the Autobots must stop the AllSpark from falling.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Cybertron Elite Guard arrives to retrieve the AllSpark but struggles to blend in on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime teams up with rival Sentinel Prime after a dangerous encounter with the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
programme.desc: A rabbid who got talent after having inhaled the air from a balloon, is suddenly destined to become a star!

programme.title: Welcome to the Rabbids!
programme.desc: A solitary rabbid who has no friend to fly with him to the Moon goes out on a search for one.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are arguing.
programme.desc: A Rabbid sticks a fake nose on his face, that changes the sound of his voice.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?! Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Happy New Year… Again!
programme.desc: Masha decides celebrating New Year once is not enough and goes to mysterious China, where dragons dance, gardens bloom and many, many more interesting things are happening!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: The Tops and the Roots
programme.desc: There was a village and a man, living in this village. In a deep forest near that village, the Bear settled in. The Bear asked the man for some tasty treats. The man gave the Bear two options of what he prefers to eat: the tops or the roots. The Bear decided to take the tops. The man grew a turnip and gave the tops to the Bear. The tops were tasteless. The Bear asked the man to try the turnip. The man agreed on the condition that the Bear will help him with the housework and keep off the flies. While chasing away the flies, the Bear accidentally hit the man on the nose. The Bear was scared and ran away into the forest, grabbing the turnip with him. Since then, people use to say “to be a fool for one's pains”.

programme.title: Ali Baba
programme.desc: This story is about one very kind, but very poor Ali-Baba and his rich but greedy brother Kasym. Once upon a time Ali-Baba overheard the magic spell, which opens up the magic cape with numerous treasures. These treasures were stolen by the thieves and kept in this cave. One day Ali-Baba met Kasym and told him the secret spell. Kasym got inside the cape, but accidentally forgot the spell and the thieves caught him. They forced Kasym to learn the whole book of fairy tales by heart and spend one thousand days and a thousand and one nights telling these stories to them. This story teaches us to study well and avoid cheating.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.
